steps.title: Compare claim and details
steps.content: The first sentence makes a broad claim: a more diverse generation of artists is stepping up to the podium. The next sentence names two conductors who did that, so the transition should introduce examples.

steps.title: Choose an example signal
steps.content: A merely adds information, B suggests the last item in a list, and C signals concession. The needed transition presents the conductors as specific examples of the broader claim. The answer is D.
